productDisplayName: Nike Men Cricket White Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteGear up this summer for the IPL tournment with your favourite team's T-shirt. Sport this trendy T-shirt from nike and be true to your city!Product DetailsWhite polo T-shirt with a spread collar, two-buttoned placket, short sleeves and vents at the hem, Nike logo on the right chest, Kolkata logo on the left chest, city name printed on the left sleeve and 'Be true to your city' printed on the back neckMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorations
